finding: The R-032 packet can be captured in-browser with Web Crypto SHA-256 and immutable structured clones, while retaining a strict boundary between browser processing evidence and independently observed audibility.
design_implication: Vercel runtime globals can be transformed into a digest-bound packet inside the browser; server-side finalization may add signatures later, but must not reinterpret processing as audibility.

verification.runtime: isolated Node using Web Crypto implementation

uncertainty: No live Safari or Vercel runtime capture was performed.
falsification_route: Run the adapter in deployed mobile Safari, mutate runtime globals after capture, recompute component digests independently, and compare the packet with a separate device-level or human audibility observation.
